name: StudioMCPHub
description: Creative AI tools and art datasets for autonomous agents. Image generation, upscaling, metadata enrichment, provenance registration, permanent storage, NFT minting, and access to 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum.

authSchemes.description: Pay per call with USDC on Base L2. No account needed. HTTP 402 flow.
API key or GCX credit token via Authorization header.

skills.name: Search Tools
skills.description: Discover available tools by category or price without loading all schemas. Start here to save tokens.

skills.name: Get Tool Schema
skills.description: Get the full JSON Schema and usage examples for a specific tool.

skills.name: Generate Image
skills.description: Text-to-image generation using SD 3.5 Large + T5-XXL on NVIDIA L4 GPU.
examples: Generate a serene Japanese garden at sunset

skills.name: Upscale Image
skills.description: 4x super-resolution using Real-ESRGAN on NVIDIA L4 GPU.

skills.name: Enrich Metadata
skills.description: AI-powered artwork analysis via Gemini 2.5/3.0 Pro. Returns 8-section Golden Codex JSON.
examples: Analyze artwork and generate Golden Codex metadata

skills.name: Infuse Metadata
skills.description: Embed Golden Codex metadata into image via ExifTool (XMP-gc, IPTC, C2PA).
examples: Embed metadata into a PNG image

skills.name: Register Hash
skills.description: Register 256-bit perceptual hash with LSH band indexing for strip-proof provenance.

skills.name: Store Permanent
skills.description: Upload to Arweave L1 for permanent, immutable storage.
examples: Store an image permanently on Arweave

skills.name: Mint NFT
skills.description: Mint as NFT on Polygon with on-chain provenance link.
examples: Mint an artwork as an NFT on Polygon

skills.name: Verify Provenance
skills.description: Strip-proof provenance verification via Aegis hash index.
examples: Check if an image has registered provenance

skills.name: Full Pipeline
skills.description: Complete creative pipeline: enrich, upscale, infuse, register in one call.
examples: Run full pipeline on an image, skipping mint and storage

skills.name: Search Artworks
skills.description: Search 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum.
examples: Search for impressionist landscapes from the Met

skills.name: Get Artwork
skills.description: Get Human_Standard metadata (500-1200 tokens) + signed image URL.

skills.name: Get Artwork Oracle
skills.description: Get Hybrid_Premium 111-field NEST analysis (2K-6K tokens) + image.
examples: Get deep AI analysis for met_437419

skills.name: Batch Download
skills.description: Bulk download metadata + images from Alexandria Aeternum (min 100).

skills.name: Compliance Manifest
skills.description: Get AB 2013 + EU AI Act Article 53 compliance manifests for dataset usage.
examples: Get compliance manifest for Alexandria Aeternum
